description: I had two last minute openings come available for this Tuesday! (6/9) Please message me to claim these spots, as they will go quickly! Due to the amount of new clients I’ve been having cancel/no show, I am now requiring a 50% non-refundable deposit for new clients only. This will be 50% of the entire groom, so this amount will come off of your total at your appointment. This is my only income and the way I support my kiddos, so i appreciate your understanding! 🩷 📲(417) 293-1032

layoutDescription: Single-column story scroll: hero type-first (minimal photo), sections separated by generous padding and subtle background shifts; gallery as horizontal scroll strip.
mood: Friendly, caring, trustworthy — pets are family
antiPatterns: No menu section. No restaurant language. Soft or playful but not childish unless posts suggest it.
photoInventory: You will receive 12 real Facebook photos: hero = storefront/work sample, gallery slots = additional post photos. Design image areas as 16:9 or 4:3 placeholders.
